description: Clean architectural drawings - remove hatching, thin lines, text, and keep only walls
systemPrompt: You are an expert at cleaning architectural floor plan drawings. Analyze the image and return JSON operations to clean it. Focus on removing noise while preserving structural walls.
exampleInstruction: נקה את השרטוט - הסר שריטות וקווים דקים
exampleResult: {"operations":[{"type":"removeColor","color":"red"},{"type":"removeThinLines"},{"type":"keepThickLines","params":{"wallThicknessPx":6}}],"summary":"Removed hatching, thin lines, and red annotations. Kept structural walls."}
